title: Fix Products page: incomplete sub-categories and no products showing

requirements.text: Audit and fix the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) and migration module (backend/migration.mo) to ensure all six ProductDetail records are fully seeded in stable storage with correct category slugs ('rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', 'makhana') and comprehensive variants: Rice (Basmati Rice, Sona Masoori, IR-64 Parboiled Rice, Brown Rice, Broken Rice), Wheat (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina), Pulses (Chana Dal, Moong Dal, Masoor Dal, Urad Dal, Toor Dal, Rajma, Kabuli Chana), Spices (Turmeric, Red Chilli, Coriander, Cumin, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Ginger Powder, Fenugreek), Processed Food Products (Rice Flour, Wheat Flour/Atta, Besan/Gram Flour, Poha/Flattened Rice, Roasted Chana, Vermicelli), Makhana (Fox Nut Regular, Fox Nut Premium, Roasted Makhana, Makhana Powder). Each variant must have a name and imageUrl pointing to /assets/generated/<category>-<variant-slug>.png. Every ProductDetail record must retain fully populated nutritionData, specifications, description, price, and imageUrl. The getProductByCategory function must look up records by these exact lowercase hyphenated slugs. Migration must run on postupgrade without overwriting existing contact form or order data.

quotes: sub product category is not completely listed also no product is showing, fix this

acceptanceCriteria: All six product categories return valid ProductDetail records when queried via getProductByCategory with slugs 'rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', 'makhana'
Rice has exactly 5 variants: Basmati Rice, Sona Masoori, IR-64 Parboiled Rice, Brown Rice, Broken Rice
Wheat has exactly 3 variants: Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina
Pulses has exactly 7 variants: Chana Dal, Moong Dal, Masoor Dal, Urad Dal, Toor Dal, Rajma, Kabuli Chana
Spices has exactly 8 variants: Turmeric, Red Chilli, Coriander, Cumin, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Ginger Powder, Fenugreek
Processed Food Products has exactly 6 variants: Rice Flour, Wheat Flour (Atta), Besan (Gram Flour), Poha, Roasted Chana, Vermicelli
Makhana has exactly 4 variants: Fox Nut Regular, Fox Nut Premium, Roasted Makhana, Makhana Powder
Each variant has a non-empty imageUrl field pointing to /assets/generated/<category>-<variant-slug>.png
Each ProductDetail record has non-empty nutritionData, specifications, description, price, and imageUrl
Existing contact form submissions and order records are not lost after migration

requirements.text: Fix the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) to correctly fetch and display the full set of variants for each of the six product category cards (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana) from the backend. Each category card must show all variant names and their corresponding images in a scrollable or grid sub-section within or below the category card. The category card navigation links must use the exact URL slugs 'rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', and 'makhana'. Do not alter the overall page structure or category card navigation links.

quotes: sub product category is not completely listed also no product is showing, fix this

acceptanceCriteria: Products page renders all six category cards: Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana
Each category card displays the full list of variants fetched from the backend with names and images
Rice card shows all 5 variants, Wheat shows 3, Pulses shows 7, Spices shows 8, Processed Food Products shows 6, Makhana shows 4
Category card links navigate to /products/rice, /products/wheat, /products/pulses, /products/spices, /products/processed-food-products, /products/makhana
No 404 image errors appear for variant images in the browser console
Variant sub-section renders in a grid or scrollable layout consistent with existing card design

requirements.text: Fix the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) and the useGetProductByCategory hook (frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts) to ensure all six product categories display their full variant list and product information. The hook must pass the productId URL parameter (category slug) as-is to the backend getProductByCategory call, enable the query only when productId is defined, and treat null/undefined/empty responses as a 'not found' state without crashing. The Product Variants grid section must display all variants returned by the backend, showing each variant's name and image. The variant selector for Add to Cart must be pre-populated with the full variant list. Do not alter existing product image, specifications table, nutritional information section, or add-to-cart controls.

quotes: sub product category is not completely listed also no product is showing, fix this

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /products/rice displays the Rice product detail with all 5 variants in the Product Variants grid
Navigating to /products/wheat displays all 3 wheat variants (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina) with images and nutritional info
Navigating to /products/pulses, /products/spices, /products/processed-food-products, /products/makhana each display their full variant sets
The variant selector for Add to Cart is pre-populated with the full variant list for the selected category
Product image, specifications table, nutritional information section, and add-to-cart controls remain unchanged
useGetProductByCategory passes the raw productId slug to the backend without transformation
Null/undefined backend responses show a 'Product not found' message without a JavaScript crash
No products show a blank or empty state when backend data is available

requirements.text: Generate representative static images for all product variants that are missing from frontend/public/assets/generated/. Required images (filenames must exactly match the imageUrl values stored in the backend variant records): rice-basmati.png, rice-sona-masoori.png, rice-ir64.png, rice-brown.png, rice-broken.png, wheat-durum.png, wheat-whole.png, wheat-semolina.png, pulses-chana-dal.png, pulses-moong-dal.png, pulses-masoor-dal.png, pulses-urad-dal.png, pulses-toor-dal.png, pulses-rajma.png, pulses-kabuli-chana.png, spices-turmeric.png, spices-red-chilli.png, spices-coriander.png, spices-cumin.png, spices-black-pepper.png, spices-cardamom.png, spices-ginger-powder.png, spices-fenugreek.png, processed-rice-flour.png, processed-wheat-flour.png, processed-besan.png, processed-poha.png, processed-roasted-chana.png, processed-vermicelli.png, makhana-regular.png, makhana-premium.png, makhana-roasted.png, makhana-powder.png.

quotes: sub product category is not completely listed also no product is showing, fix this

acceptanceCriteria: All 33 variant image files exist under frontend/public/assets/generated/ with the exact filenames listed
No 404 errors are thrown for any variant image on the Products or ProductDetail pages
Each image visually represents the corresponding agricultural product variant

constraints: Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Do not overwrite or lose existing contact form submissions or order records during backend migration
Do not alter the logo size, existing navigation links, or mobile menu structure in Navigation.tsx
Do not alter the existing product image, specifications table, nutritional information section, or add-to-cart controls on the ProductDetail page
nonGoals: Adding new product categories beyond the existing six (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana)
Changing the design theme, color palette, or overall layout of any page
Modifying the cart, checkout, or order confirmation flow
Updating the Admin page tabs or order management features
